CustomField.description: Set to true by the EJ detector gate when the comment mentions tribal sovereignty, sacred sites, environmental justice communities, low-income impact, or civil rights. Bypasses AI categorization and routes to a human EJ/Tribal Liaison coordinator.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Flagged for mandatory human review. Set automatically when EJ/tribal/civil-rights triggers are detected.
CustomField.label: Requires Human Review
